changes: Improved UI readability across all panels
Added A- and A+ font size controls
XP bars now show tier colors by level
Training dummy now shows XP feedback and hit movement
Fixed player spawn to safe central area
Right-click no longer triggers gameplay actions
Removed old legacy drops from active gameplay
Adjusted woodcutting progression: Grimoak Lv 15 and Deadwood Lv 30
Added starter guidance tips in the status panel
Added beta leaderboard and highscores modal
New mob sprites: Thornling, Hollowfolk, Rockmite, Ghoul
New resource tiers: trees, rocks, herbs by level
Waystone repair and H key home teleport
Combat polish: camera shake, impact particles, hit flash
Ambient effects: bonfire embers, dust motes, leaf drift
Beta leaderboard syncs public stats only — no cloud saves
Style abilities: Thrust, Quick Shot, Arc Burst, Root Snare
